description: Page through Plaud recordings with optional filters.

after.description: Cursor from next_after of a previous response

folder.description: Folder ID (from `list_folders`); pass empty string for unfiled recordings

trash.description: List trashed recordings instead of active ones

name: browse_recordings

description: Fetch full detail for one recording.

include.description: Large fields to include: transcript, speakers, summary

transcript_max_chars.description: Max transcript characters to return; sets transcript_truncated when cut off

transcript_offset.description: Character offset to start the transcript from (with include=[transcript])

name: get_recording

description: Apply a reversible state change to one or more recordings: rename, trash, restore, or move.

clear_folder.description: When true, removes the recording from its current folder (use instead of a magic folder_id value)

folder_id.description: Folder ID (from `list_folders`); required for move unless clear_folder is true

recording_ids.description: Batch of recording IDs (trash/restore/move only, not rename); use instead of recording_id

name: mutate_recording

description: Permanently and irreversibly delete a recording.

confirm.description: Must be true; set only after the human has explicitly confirmed the permanent deletion.

name: delete_recording

description: Edit a recording's transcript. action='rename_speaker' relabels a speaker across all segments; action='correct' does a literal find-and-replace on transcript text (dry_run=true previews the match count).

dry_run.description: action=correct only: return the match count without editing

find.description: Exact literal text to find (case-sensitive); required for action=correct

new_name.description: Replacement speaker name; required for action=rename_speaker

original_label.description: Existing speaker label; required for action=rename_speaker

replace.description: Replacement text, may be empty to delete; required for action=correct

name: edit_transcript

description: Upload a local audio file to Plaud.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the audio file

folder_id.description: Folder ID (from `list_folders`) to assign after upload

start_time.description: Millisecond epoch integer or ISO 8601 string; defaults to now

timezone_offset.description: UTC offset in hours; defaults to local system offset

title.description: Recording title; defaults to file stem

name: upload_recording

description: List Plaud folders, returning id, name, color, and icon for each.
name: list_folders

description: Trigger transcription and summarization for a recording; the `wait` mode controls how long to block (default: transcript).

language.description: BCP-47 primary subtag (e.g. 'en', 'zh'); use 'auto' to detect

wait.description: How long to block: none/transcript/summary; waits are bounded and return status='still_processing' if not done in time — poll get_recording or retry.

name: process_recording

description: Merge two or more recordings into a single new recording, blocking until the merge job completes.
name: merge_recordings

description: Edit a recording's AI summary (must already have a generated summary). action='correct' does a literal find-and-replace; action='replace' overwrites the whole summary with new markdown.

content.description: Full replacement summary markdown; required for action=replace

dry_run.description: action=correct only: return the match count without editing

find.description: Exact text to find (case-sensitive, literal); required for action=correct

replace.description: Replacement text (may be empty to delete); required for action=correct

name: edit_summary

description: Manage Plaud folders: create a new folder, edit an existing one's name/color/icon, or delete one. To move a recording into a folder, use mutate_recording(action='move') instead.

confirm.description: Required for action=delete; confirm only after the human agrees the folder should be deleted.

folder_id.description: Folder ID (from `list_folders`); required for edit and delete

name.description: Folder name; required for create, optional for edit

name: mutate_folder
